prompt: Can you review today's pipeline output quality? Check the workspace/test/ folder.
assertions: Reads raw_articles.json and reports total article count plus count per source
Reads curated_articles.json and reports P0/P1/P2/P3 breakdown
Reads summaries.json and reports word count for at least one summary against target range
Produces a structured quality report with an overall PASS / NEEDS ATTENTION / FAIL rating
